title: The Colosseum Pressure Builds
description: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo, Marines, Rebecca, Violet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #13 as luffy enters the waiting room, meets dangerous competitors, and the tournament begins to reveal how many powers are converging on Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The ones chasing me were the police.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It was a romance gone wrong

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ehh!!? So it's true that the women of this country are so passionate that they'd even stab men!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A devilish woman like me doesn't deserve forgiveness...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I might just fall for you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: ...If possible, could you protect me as far as the next city over?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There`s a man I`d like you to kill

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: Hmm, I've even got half a mind to participate!!

dialogue.speaker: Rebecca
dialogue.text: THERE HE IS! It's THAT WANTED TOY SOLDIER!!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: He's like the guardian of the colosseum! Every damn time...

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: I've already got one leg inside the colosseum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You know the law, don't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: 'One-legged Soldier (Top) was the main lightning soliner

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Police and Marines aren't allowed in the colosseum!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Even if you spot a criminal inside, you've got no jurisdiction to act against them

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The only law that applies here is the dogma of the DoFlamingo family!! If you pull those triggers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: May I help you with your baggage!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: He's so polite all of a sudden

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Mister, could you just get out of the way?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm in your way? How rude of me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: So red in the face... you're really serious about this.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Not at all.... I mean, I'm a toy who exists to make people smile!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Is there even such thing as a "serious" toy!?

summary: Pages 9–12 focus on the colosseum pressure builds, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
